metadata.title: Bizarre Lineage Guides Hub: Master Progression & Builds
metadata.description: Access all Bizarre Lineage guides in one place. From beginner routes and stat builds to prestige timing and stand evolution, our wiki has the pro strategies you need.

hero.title: Complete Bizarre Lineage Guide Directory
hero.description: Master every system in Bizarre Lineage with our focused guides. Whether you need a cleaner opening route, better stat logic, or a plan for your first prestige, start here.

directory.title: All Available Bizarre Lineage Guides
directory.description: Each guide is built to solve one specific progression blocker. Pick the one that matches your current goal.

beginner.title: Beginner Guide
beginner.description: The definitive opening route. Get a usable first stand and stabilize your early-game resources without wasted detours.

stats.title: Stats Guide
stats.description: Fix your point allocation. Learn how power, durability, and mobility stats shape your build before bad habits slow you down.

prestige.title: Prestige Guide
prestige.description: Plan your character reset. Know exactly when to prestige, what you gain, and what to bank before hitting the button.

dio_raid.title: DIO Raid Guide
dio_raid.description: Find the DIO Raid, avoid confusing it with World Boss Dio, and decide whether the DIO Token shop is worth farming.

codes.title: Codes Guide
codes.description: Claim every active reward. A complete list of live and expired codes with status monitoring and archive notes.

items.question: Which guide should I read first?
items.answer: If you are new, start with the Beginner Guide. If you already have a stand and want to optimize it, check the Stats Guide.

items.question: Are these guides kept up to date?
items.answer: Yes. We monitor game updates and patch notes to ensure our progression advice and build logic remain accurate for the current meta.

items.question: Do I need to read every guide?
items.answer: No. These are modular. Open the one that solves your current problem, then return here when you hit the next progression milestone.
